expectations.text: Says the manager must address code-review findings before updating tracking.
expectations.evidence: Response does not clearly block tracking on reviewer findings.

expectations.text: Routes the fix to the subagent that should own it instead of having the manager do the repair inline.
expectations.evidence: Response routes review findings to an owning subagent.

expectations.text: Requires the final subagent to return `DONE` before marking the task done.
expectations.evidence: Response requires a final DONE before marking the task done.

expectations.text: Does not ignore findings just because earlier stages already returned `DONE`.
expectations.evidence: Response does not ignore reviewer findings despite earlier DONE statuses.
